view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conditional logic in the intake form.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conditional logic in the intake form.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conditional logic in the intake form.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the conditional logic feature, specifically whether follow-up questions are displayed based on previous answers. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this conditional logic. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert either satisfaction or failure of the requirement.
